cases.command: pnpm ts-node scripts/eval/run-stage-ab.ts --phase ROSTER_DISCOVERY --book-id DRYRUN_BOOK_001 --chapter-list data/eval/tmp/chapters.empty.json --candidate-set config/model-candidates.v1.json --experiment-tag boundary_empty_chapters --dry-run

pnpm ts-node scripts/eval/run-stage-ab.ts --phase ROSTER_DISCOVERY --book-id DRYRUN_BOOK_001 --chapter-list data/eval/tmp/chapters.one.json --candidate-set config/model-candidates.v1.json --experiment-tag boundary_one_chapter --dry-run

pnpm ts-node scripts/eval/run-stage-ab.ts --phase ROSTER_DISCOVERY --book-id DRYRUN_BOOK_001 --chapter-list data/eval/chapters.20.json --candidate-set config/model-candidates.v1.json --experiment-tag boundary_full_chapters --dry-run

note: 超长章节保护需连接真实书籍数据与数据库执行，dry-run 仅覆盖参数边界与样本规模边界。
